name: Magic Armor & Shields
description: Armor proper subtracts its bonus from the hit dice of the wearer's opponents. When a shield's bonus exceeds the armor's, there is a one-third chance a blow is caught on the shield, granting the larger subtraction. Variants per the Armor table: Shield +1/+2/+3, Armor +1/+2, Armor & Shield +1/+2.
